case_title: EDISON MA VS. GEM PARKING, INC., AND PPS PARKING, INC., A PARTNE

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, EDISON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEM PARKING, INC., AND PPS PARKING, INC., A PARTNE RSHIP DBA GEM & PPS PARKING CO. $69.41 PRINCIPAL, $.84 INTEREST, $115.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $185.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
